description: 26V triple-channel 13-bit I2C shunt current and bus voltage monitor

Configuration.name: Configuration
Configuration.description: All-register reset, shunt and bus voltage ADC conversion times and averaging, operating mode.

fields.name: RST
fields.description: Reset bit. Set to 1 for system reset (POR), self-clears.

fields.name: V_SH_CT
fields.description: Shunt voltage conversion time: same settings as V_BUS_CT.

Configuration.name: Mask/Enable Register

fields.name: CF1
fields.description: Critical alert flag for channel 1. Cleared by reading this register.

fields.name: CF2
fields.description: Critical alert flag for channel 2. Cleared by reading this register.

fields.name: CF3
fields.description: Critical alert flag for channel 3. Cleared by reading this register.

fields.name: SF
fields.description: Summation alert flag. Cleared by reading this register.

fields.name: WF1
fields.description: Warning alert flag for channel 1. Cleared by reading this register.

fields.name: WF2
fields.description: Warning alert flag for channel 2. Cleared by reading this register.

fields.name: WF3
fields.description: Warning alert flag for channel 3. Cleared by reading this register.

fields.name: PVF
fields.description: Power-valid alert flag. Reflects PV pin state.

fields.name: TCF
fields.description: Timing-control alert flag. Remains set until power cycle or reset.
